services.title: End-to-End Overseas Manpower Solutions
services.desc: Whether you are a job seeker looking for opportunities abroad or an employer seeking skilled staff, we have you covered.

split.seeker_desc: Find verified overseas career opportunities across Europe, the Gulf, and North America. Get absolute guidance on profiling, embassy interviews, visa paperwork, and logistics from start to finish.
split.employer_desc: Source vetted, medically certified, and technically proficient manpower for your business requirements. We support high-volume deployments and specialized technical recruiting across core industries.

howItWorks.title: How to Get a Job Abroad
howItWorks.desc: A simple, transparent, and completely legal 4-step process to land your dream job overseas safely.
howItWorks.step1_desc: Fill out our quick lead form and upload your updated resume or share company manpower requests.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Our recruiting specialists match your qualifications with open international job requisitions.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Attend client interviews (virtual/face-to-face) and compile standard employment paperwork.
howItWorks.step4_desc: We handle work visa filings, medical tests, emigration clearance, and organize pre-departure briefings.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by Candidates & Employers
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories and feedback from people who connected with Trendy Fortune.
testimonials.video_description: See how Trendy Fortune guides candidates through overseas job opportunities.
testimonials.item1_text: Trendy Fortune helped me understand the overseas job process clearly and guided me with documentation step by step.
testimonials.item2_text: The team explained the work permit and job process in simple language. It made the process easier for my family to understand.
testimonials.item3_text: I received clear guidance about required documents, interview preparation, and overseas job options.
testimonials.item4_text: Trendy Fortune helped us connect with suitable skilled workers for our overseas hiring needs.
testimonials.item5_text: The support was professional and transparent. I knew what documents were needed and what steps came next.
testimonials.item6_text: The team was responsive and guided me through the process without confusion.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about overseas jobs, documents, employers, and support.
faq.item1_question: How do I apply for an overseas job?
faq.item1_answer: You can fill out the job seeker form on the website or contact us on WhatsApp. Our team will review your details and guide you through the next steps.
faq.item2_question: Which countries do you provide job opportunities for?
faq.item2_answer: We work with opportunities across countries such as UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Russia, Malaysia, Vietnam, and other international destinations based on current demand.
faq.item3_question: Do I need a passport to apply?
faq.item3_answer: A passport is usually required for overseas job processing. If you do not have one yet, our team can guide you on the basic document requirements.
faq.item4_answer: Common documents include passport, resume, work experience details, educational or trade certificates, photographs, and identity documents. Exact requirements depend on the job and country.
faq.item5_question: Can employers request manpower through the website?
faq.item5_answer: Yes. Employers can use the employer inquiry form to share manpower requirements. Our team will review the requirement and connect with suitable hiring support.
faq.item6_question: How can I contact Trendy Fortune directly?
faq.item6_answer: You can call us, email us, visit the office, or use the WhatsApp button on the website for quick assistance.
